case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT VS. TYRONE WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TYRONE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TYRONE $1,975.03 PRINCIPAL, $114.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,089.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
